summary: SPK RC 38 bo sung day du guard trong worker event bus de package native SQLite khong goi pg_notify nham.
changes: Worker event-bus gio co guard local-only ngay tai publishWorkerEvent, nen bundle SPK native se dung transcode an toan ca khi runtime SQLite khong dung cluster bus.
Dong bo day du fix resolver + worker publish path, tranh tinh trang version/release dung nhung file worker trong goi van con thieu patch.
Ban nay danh rieng cho loi proxy bi treo running/cho do worker goi pg_notify tren SQLite.
